# mutation-errors

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Warning toast and persistent notification for unhandled TanStack Query mutation errors.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Core.Root` → `MutationErrorWatcher`
  - Uses: `infra/endpoints.getEndpointErrorMessage`, `shell/notifications.toast`
